calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-457 first-class actor-critic action-learning ON/OFF validation (A0-A3 cotrain x SF-critic + bias_head control + local_view/oracle/random anchors; D0+D3; foraging teacher)
items.note: MECH-457 ON/OFF validation sanctioned by failure_autopsy_734-737-conversion-ceiling-competence_2026-07-11 as the next test after the actor-critic substrate landed (ree_core/action_learning/actor_critic.py, 2026-07-12). RPE teacher = FORAGING reward (user-confirmed 2026-07-12; substrate benefit-harm teacher NOT used -> no ARC-030 grounding phase). 8 arms: A0-A3 = cotrain_encoder{F,T} x use_sf_critic{F,T} + bias_head_baseline (724 all-ON incompetence control) + local_view_greedy (738 fair denominator, 48.05@D3) + greedy_oracle + random_walk. D0+D3 (x734 rungs), seeds 42/43/44, phased P0 warmup -> P1 A2C actor-critic (GAE; cotrain adds latent_stack to optimizer + live z_world, frozen detaches) -> P2 unshaped foraging eval. DV = capability_eval foraging_competence vs 1.0 floor, strict majority @D3. PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING: route to /failure-autopsy (accepts PASS target) before any governance action / MECH-457 promotion. deeper_than_action_learning self-route -> RE-AUTOPSY not a lettered floor re-test (734/737 RESOLVED_BY_FANOUT refusal stands). Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-12. Arm-fingerprint self-mint in-run (reuse-eligible, include_driver_script_in_hash=False); separate baseline mint SKIPPED -- first-of-lineage with machine_affinity=any (a cloud mint is not reusable by a Mac run and vice versa) + the OFF/warmup recipe co-evolves with the encoder under test; the free in-run self-mint banks all 8 cells for any strictly-later successor.

items.title: INV-088 world/goal-evaluator DV coupling -- 8-seed re-estimate on shared maturation-curriculum module + frozen-prefix cache mint
items.note: Higher-seed (3->8) re-estimate of V3-EXQ-744, which landed FAIL/inconclusive: DV-coupling magnitude cleared (mean_delta_r2 0.232>=0.15) but the 3-seed SD 0.168 failed C1's effect-size gate (mean>=2*SD=0.336) and C2 failed; C3 passed. Identical pre-registered criteria/preconditions; only seeds + module-based prefix differ. Builds its frozen z_world prefix via experiments/_lib/baselines/maturation_curriculum.mature_and_collect_world (bit-identity-verified reproduction of 744/740a inline; the frozen_representation_from_maturation_trajectory reuse-ineligible flag was empirically FALSE and is dropped). Cells are arm_fingerprint reuse-ELIGIBLE (include_driver_script_in_hash=False). MINTS the frozen-prefix TENSOR cache for all 40 (8x5) cells: 744 ran inline so this run is fully cold (all miss+store); tensor-reuse benefit is realized by later world-leg siblings / a re-run. Pin to cloud class linux-x86_64-py3.10 (regime A) via machine_affinity any. First 3 seeds reproduce 744 bit-identically (superset replication).

items.title: INV-089 harm-evaluator z_harm CALIBRATED bound (deferred 743 core coupling)
items.note: DEFERRED calibrated bound test for INV-089 (child ii of INV-064), the CORE coupling V3-EXQ-743 reported-not-gated. 743 (PASS) established only the load-bearing POSITIVE CONTROL (realized harm decodable from z_harm + rises with HarmEncoder maturation); its harm_eval_z_harm 'bound' (SEC_*) failed to gate because the DV was under-determined realized post-random-action harm and 740a's 0.03/0.15 magnitude thresholds were mis-calibrated for the narrow/high-JL z_harm gradient. This run fixes BOTH: (a) a STATE-DETERMINED DV target = ground-truth clip(hazard_field[agent],0,1) aligned to the SAME state z_harm encodes (NOT realized post-action harm); (b) SCALE-FREE (rank-monotonicity + IV<->DV coupling + effect-size reliability) thresholds, NO absolute 740a magnitude floors. Verifies harm_eval_z_harm held-out quality rises monotonically with z_harm differentiation across onset {0,1,4,12,30}, 8 seeds (744a-style, for power). PASS moves INV-089 provisional->toward stable. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout (harm_eval quality vs a STATE-DETERMINED target under calibrated criteria) is NOT recorded in 743 (743 only tested the realized-harm target + failed SEC_* coupling) -> new manipulation, run. Re-derive brake HONOURED (0 substrate_ceiling/non_contributory autopsies tag INV-089; z_harm observable distinct from the z_world 740-cluster; no z_world decode -> not a 740b). EXTENDS V3-EXQ-743, supersedes NOTHING (743's positive-control stands). queue_id 745 taken by a parallel session (MECH-456 rebinding) -> this took 746. Cells reuse-INELIGIBLE (state-determined target collected by inline driver code, not a hashed _lib module) -> fingerprints emitted+flagged; NO separate baseline mint (no OFF arm; a future z_harm sibling wanting cross-driver reuse should first factor a state-determined harm mature+collect into _lib/baselines/maturation_curriculum.py). Manifest via write_flat_manifest (recording-standard always-core). claim_ids=[INV-089]; experiment_purpose=evidence. Do NOT touch running V3-EXQ-742. [Landed on main via temp worktree: an earlier commit accidentally went onto integration/pack-writer-migration in the shared checkout; re-applied cleanly here.]

items.title: MECH-457 bias_head_baseline MINT -- order-independent reuse insurance for the V3-EXQ-742 OFF arm (724-A0 all-ON; D0+D3; baseline)
items.note: Separate baseline mint for the MECH-457 actor-critic ON/OFF lineage's reusable OFF arm (bias_head_baseline = 724-A0 all-ON incompetence control), banked ORDER-INDEPENDENTLY of V3-EXQ-742. Both this mint and the 742 consumer build the OFF cell + its fingerprint from the ONE shared module experiments/_lib/baselines/exq742_mech457_bias_head_baseline.py (run_off_cell + off_path_config_slice), include_driver_script_in_hash=False on both sides -> arm_fingerprint MATCHES by construction (verified: reuse-lookup key 4c316086... identical consumer-vs-mint). PINNED ree-cloud-4 (linux-x86_64-py3.10) so the fingerprint is the reusable cloud machine-class (a Mac mint would be a dead-on-arrival different class). LOW priority (5) so real science preempts. experiment_purpose=baseline, claim_ids=[] -> excluded from governance scoring; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING. A future MECH-457 iteration cites this run_id via reuse_baseline_from to skip re-training the byte-identical OFF arm. Corrects the parent session's initial wrongly-skipped separate mint (terminality unknowable; first-of-lineage is the paradigm mint case). Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-12.
